title: Sketchy Books
description: Sketchy Books lets you draw pixel-art sketches directly inside Books & Quills, turning them into illustrated journals.
body:
**Sketchy Books** lets you draw pixel-art sketches directly inside **Books & Quills**, turning them into true illustrated journals.

Before signing a book, players can freely doodle on its pages using a simple pixel-based drawing interface, allowing sketches, symbols, diagrams, or small drawings to be added alongside written text.

Once the book is signed, all drawings and text are permanently preserved inside the signed book, just like vanilla content. Illustrated books can then be shared, traded, or stored without losing any data.

The mod is fully **server-compatible** and works seamlessly in **multiplayer**, ensuring that all players see the same drawings exactly as intended.

Sketchy Books is designed as a lightweight, vanilla-friendly quality-of-life mod that expands the creative and practical use of books without altering core gameplay.
